description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure features large, rectangular windows arranged in horizontal bands, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front includes a covered entryway and a driveway leading to a carport, while the rear showcases a spacious patio area with lounge chairs, a rectangular swimming pool, and a circular hot tub. The property is enclosed by a low fence, and the backyard is designed for outdoor living and relaxation. The exterior is finished in a combination of light gray and brick textures, with white window frames and trim. An American flag is mounted on the roof, adding a distinctive touch to the overall appearance.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a front carport, and a backyard featuring a pool and hot tub, all enclosed by a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, and covered porch area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, carport, and the arrangement of windows along the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, hot tub, patio furniture, and the American flag on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended brick facade, additional windows, and the full length of the property.
